reviews.review_msg: reply very slow and didn't care what you say.  very not helpful  don't choose her to be your teacher.

I feel that Phyllis is the most disorganized, boring and useless professor I have ever experienced. I did exceptionally well on all assignments, as reflected in my WEBCT percentage of 85%. I was sure I would get at LEAST a B. So, due to her teaching inabilities, my grade was bell-curved so far down as to reflect a C- for 85%, I was surprised!!!
Terrible control over class. Received a mid 80's grade but finished class with a C+. Worst class ever. Easy, but somehow detrimental to GPA. Doesn't make sense.

Prof and TA's are super disorganized and lazy.  Our marks are never updated on webct (Dec 15th today and still havent been updated).  It's so fustrasting just thinking about this class.  Ignore at all costs.

A disorganized prof teaches organizational behaviour. Lectures are not helpful at all. The MT had MC and written questions. Final had 12 written questions. She's the worst prof I have ever had.I don't recommend her.

Awful prof, not helpful at all and her lectures are pretty much useless unless you want to sleep through it. Also very disorganized, even the TAs were confused about what was happening. I recommend avoiding this prof at all costs.

She freaking disappereard on us on the last week of class!  didnt email or post in the discussion to tell us about whats happening in regards to final, presentations, etc.  Easy course, but not so great prof.  Stick to reading the book.  Can't wait till the all written final *sigh*

Unhelpful lectures & notes, but fair midterm. monotone puts people to sleep. final is all written questions, which will require u to utilize ur brain for memorizing all the definitions and theories. Doesn't know how to use a computer, wasted 15 minutes of class time to show a video clip which is totally not related to the course.
Very soft-spoken so you are instantly put to sleep... Lectures are basically not very helpful... Just stick to reading the textbook...
